common.imagePermissionMessage: We need permission to access images from your gallery.

settings.title: Settings
settings.distanceUnitDescription: Choose how distance is displayed in the app (kilometers or miles)
settings.enableWalkTrackingDescription: Automatically track and record walks when you walk or run outside your home area
settings.autoShareWalksDescription: Automatically share walks as posts in the feed when they meet the criteria
settings.enableGPSFirst: Enable GPS tracking first to use this setting
settings.homeAreaDescription: Walks are only tracked when you walk outside your home area. This prevents walks from being recorded when walking around inside your house.
settings.homeAreaRadiusDescription: The size of the area around your home where walks are not tracked. The larger the radius, the farther you must walk before tracking starts.
settings.walkCriteriaDescription: These settings determine when a movement should be recorded as a walk.
settings.minimumDistanceDescription: The shortest distance a walk must be to be recorded. Walks shorter than this will not be saved.
settings.minimumSpeedDescription: The lowest speed you must walk for tracking to start. Once tracking has started, you can walk slowly or stop (e.g., to let the dog sniff) without stopping tracking. Example: 3 km/h = normal walking pace.
settings.maximumSpeedDescription: If speed exceeds this value WITHOUT you having taken steps (e.g., in a car or on a scooter), tracking is aborted. If you are running (with steps), tracking continues regardless of speed. Example: 15 km/h = fast running, but filters out car/bus/bike/scooter.
settings.pauseDetectionDescription: These settings determine when a long pause should abort tracking. Used to filter out shopping mall walking, but allows pauses in parks/dog parks.
settings.pauseToleranceDescription: If you stop longer than this time within pause-radius, tracking is aborted. If you have moved a lot before the pause (e.g., in a dog park), the walk is saved. If you have moved little (e.g., shopping mall), the walk is not recorded. Example: 15 minutes = lunch or long stop.
settings.pauseRadiusDescription: If you stop longer than pause-tolerance within this radius, tracking is aborted. The smaller the radius, the more movement is allowed before the pause is registered. Example: 10m = approximately a small room, 20m = larger area.
settings.locationAccessRequiredMessage: To track walks, the app needs access to your location. You can grant access in settings.
settings.locationAccessRequiredForHome: Location access is required to set home area
settings.homeAreaSetToCurrentLocation: Home area set to current location!
settings.gpsTrackingActivated: GPS tracking activated! The app will now track walks when you walk outside your home area.
settings.expoGoMessage: Expo Go does not support all iOS permissions. GPS tracking will work when the app is open (foreground tracking). For full functionality, build a development build.
settings.activityNotificationsMasterDescription: Receive notifications about your achievements and activities
settings.enableActivityNotificationsFirst: Enable activity notifications first to use this setting
settings.weeklyAverageNotificationsDescription: Get notifications about your weekly step average compared to the previous week
settings.topPercentageNotificationsDescription: Get notifications when you're in the top % of all GetSteppin users
settings.goalStreakNotificationsDescription: Get notifications about how many days in a row you've reached your daily goal
settings.weeklyGoalNotificationsDescription: Get notifications when your weekly average exceeds your daily goal

notifications.weeklyAverage: You walked on avg {avg} steps per day last week. {difference} daily steps more than the week before.
notifications.weeklyAveragePositive: You walked on avg {avg} steps per day last week. {difference} daily steps more than the week before.
notifications.weeklyAverageNegative: You walked on avg {avg} steps per day last week. {difference} daily steps less than the week before.
notifications.topPercentage: Wow! You were in the top {global}% of all GetSteppin users{country} with {steps} steps yesterday!
notifications.goalStreak: Nailed it! You're on a {streak} day streak for your goal of {goal} steps!
notifications.weeklyGoal: Nice! You walked on avg {avg} steps per day last week. {difference} daily steps more than your goal.
